flashcards.back: A field of study that gives computers the ability to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.

flashcards.front: Name the three main types of Machine Learning.
flashcards.back: Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, and Reinforcement Learning.

flashcards.front: What is the difference between classification and regression?
flashcards.back: Classification predicts categorical labels, while regression predicts continuous values.

flashcards.front: What is overfitting in Machine Learning?
flashcards.back: When a model learns the training data too well, including noise, and performs poorly on new data.
The process of creating new input features or transforming existing features to improve model performance.
